channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: American CEOs are getting older
item.description: Data: BoardEx via "Aging at the very top," published by NBER ; Note: Sample includes 50,510 CEOs in U.S.; Chart: Emily Peck/Axios It's not just Congre...

item.title: More than half of Americans say their finances are getting worse
item.description: Data: Gallup ; Chart: Emily Peck/Axios The share of Americans who say their financial situation is getting worse is higher now than at any point in th...

item.title: OpenAI breaks free of Microsoft's cloud
item.description: OpenAI's revised Microsoft pact lets it sell AI models across multiple clouds, enabling a likely expansion with Amazon and broader enterprise distribu...

item.title: The Iran conflict has become the new Cold War
item.description: The Iran conflict has entered a Cold War-like phase of financial sanctions, gunboat interdictions and talks about having talks. Why it matters: The te...
